zh.lifeSummary: 當Irmgard von Henneberg於大約1147年出生時，她的父親Berthold Count Of Henneberg IV39歲，母親Bertha Von Putelendorf29歲。她和Konrad der Staufer Pfalzgraf bei Rhein至少有1個女兒。她去世於1197年7月15日享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Henneberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Beate, Ewald, Kurt, Ulrich.
German: habitational name from any of several places so named.

variants.name: Henneberger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Armin, Fritz, Gerhard.
German: habitational name for someone from a place called Henneberg (see   Henneberg  ).

variants.name: Henneberry
meanings: Americanized form of German and Dutch   Henneberg  .

nameMeanings.name: Irmgard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Irmgard von Henneberg was born about 1147, her father, Berthold Count Of Henneberg IV, was 39 and her mother, Bertha Von Putelendorf, was 29. She had at least 1 daughter with Konrad der Staufer Pfalzgraf bei Rhein. She died on 15 July 1197, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Irmgard von Henneberg est née environ 1147, son père, Berthold Count Of Henneberg IV, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Bertha Von Putelendorf, avait 29 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Konrad der Staufer Pfalzgraf bei Rhein. Elle est décédée le 15 juillet 1197, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Irmgard von Henneberg um 1147 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Berthold Count Of Henneberg IV 39 und ihre Mutter Bertha Von Putelendorf 29. Sie hatte mit Konrad der Staufer Pfalzgraf bei Rhein mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 15. Juli 1197 im Alter von 51 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Irmgard von Henneberg è nata il circa 1147, sua padre, Berthold Count Of Henneberg IV, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Bertha Von Putelendorf, aveva 29 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Konrad der Staufer Pfalzgraf bei Rhein. Morì il 15 luglio 1197, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Irmgard von Hennebergが約1147年に生まれた時，父Berthold Count Of Henneberg IVは39歳，母Bertha Von Putelendorfは29歳であった。彼女はKonrad der Staufer Pfalzgraf bei Rheinとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1197年7月15日に51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Irmgard von Henneberg(이)가 대략 1147년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Berthold Count Of Henneberg IV(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bertha Von Putelendorf(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 Konrad der Staufer Pfalzgraf bei Rhein(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1197년 7월 15일 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Irmgard von Henneberg nasceu aproximadamente 1147, seu pai, Berthold Count Of Henneberg IV, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Bertha Von Putelendorf, tinha 29 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Konrad der Staufer Pfalzgraf bei Rhein. Ela faleceu em 15 de julho de 1197, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Irmgard von Henneberg родилась около 1147 г., её отцу по имени Berthold Count Of Henneberg IV было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Bertha Von Putelendorf, 29. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Konrad der Staufer Pfalzgraf bei Rhein. Она умерла 15 июля 1197 г. в возрасте 51 год.
